summary: Dongjak 을: 이수진 (DPK, lawyer-politician) defeated 나경원 (UFP) 52.16 vs 45.04 — a notable Na Kyung-won loss. 동작 갑 stayed DPK (김병기 55.29). The full pattern reverses in 2024.

issues.label: Na Kyung-won's 2020 loss
issues.description: Na's first loss in this district; signaled DPK-wave reach into competitive territory.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave overcame Na's profile
issues.description: Even strong PPP-side candidate fell to the wave.

issues.label: Sadang/Heuksuk apartment pockets
issues.description: Gangnam-adjacent wealth pockets within northern DPK base.
